formulas.name: Universal Law of Gravitation
formulas.notes: Describes the gravitational force between two point masses
formulas.units: F: N, G: N m^2 kg^-2, m: kg, r: m
formulas.variables: F = gravitational force, G = gravitational constant, m1 = mass of object 1, m2 = mass of object 2, r = distance between the centers of the two objects

formulas.name: Gravitational Potential Energy
formulas.notes: Defines the gravitational potential energy of an object at a given distance from the center of the Earth
formulas.units: U: J, G: N m^2 kg^-2, m: kg, M: kg, r: m
formulas.variables: U = gravitational potential energy, G = gravitational constant, m = mass of object, M = mass of Earth, r = distance from the center of the Earth to the object

formulas.name: Escape Velocity
formulas.notes: Calculates the minimum speed required for an object to escape the gravitational pull of the Earth
formulas.units: v: m/s, G: N m^2 kg^-2, M: kg, r: m
formulas.variables: v = escape velocity, G = gravitational constant, M = mass of Earth, r = distance from the surface of the Earth

formulas.name: Weight of an object
formulas.notes: Describes the weight of an object in terms of its mass and the acceleration due to gravity
formulas.units: W: N, m: kg, g: m/s^2
formulas.variables: W = weight of the object, m = mass of the object, g = acceleration due to gravity

formulas.name: Acceleration due to gravity
formulas.notes: Calculates the acceleration due to gravity at the surface of the Earth
formulas.units: g: m/s^2, G: N m^2 kg^-2, M: kg, R: m
formulas.variables: g = acceleration due to gravity, G = gravitational constant, M = mass of the Earth, R = radius of the Earth

formulas.name: Gravitational Field Intensity
formulas.notes: Defines the gravitational field intensity at a given distance from a point mass
formulas.units: E: N/kg, G: N m^2 kg^-2, M: kg, r: m
formulas.variables: E = gravitational field intensity, G = gravitational constant, M = mass of the object, r = distance from the center of the object

formulas.name: Orbital Velocity
formulas.notes: Calculates the orbital velocity of a satellite in a circular orbit around a central body
formulas.units: v: m/s, G: N m^2 kg^-2, M: kg, r: m
formulas.variables: v = orbital velocity, G = gravitational constant, M = mass of the central body, r = radius of the orbit

formulas.name: Orbital Period
formulas.notes: Calculates the orbital period of a satellite in a circular orbit around a central body
formulas.units: T: s, r: m, v: m/s
formulas.variables: T = orbital period, r = radius of the orbit, v = orbital velocity
